prompt: A cinematic, realistic nighttime scene of a person sleeping peacefully in bed, where one half of the bed is normal and cool, while the other half is burning with glowing embers and spreading fire. Through a nearby window, a distant landscape is visible under a red-orange sky filled with haze and wildfire glow. Subtle heat distortion affects the room near the fire side. The contrast between calm sleep and approaching environmental danger is intense and unsettling. No text, no charts, no symbols. Highly detailed, emotional, photographic realism.
insight: Global temperatures are rising and environmental consequences are intensifying, bringing large-scale climate danger into everyday life.
